blocks.text: Send it as soon as it is ready. On Michelle Rose's open question, hold the investor line for the second round. Mary Frank was clear at kickoff that she wants the {{fact:f:E-2017-001.client}} story to land on operations first, and we can layer the rest in once that footing is steady.
The only add before it goes out is the two operations proof points from last week's review. They carry more weight than anything we would say about them.
